title: Property Consultant - Prestige Estates - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Prestige Estates - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Prestige Estates are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Prestige Estates:
Prestige Estates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prestige Estates!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
